name: Sourdough Banana Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Vanilla Extract (or) 1 teaspoon Grated Orange Peel
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Add Egg and mix until blended.
3. Stir in bananas and sourdough starter. Add vanilla or orange peel extract.
4. Gradually add flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda to the banana mixture, stirring until just combined.
5. Fold in chopped walnuts.
6. Pour batter into a greased 9 x 5-inch loaf pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow bread to cool completely before slicing.
